inline_comments: Telegram file downloads should trust api.telegram.org even when DNS/proxy
resolution maps to private/internal ranges in restricted networks.

Returns true if the error is Telegram's "file is too big" error. This happens when trying to download files >20MB via the Bot API. Unlike network errors, this is a permanent error and should not be retried.
Returns true if the error is a transient network error that should be retried. Returns false for permanent errors like "file is too big" (400 Bad Request).
Don't retry "file is too big" - it's a permanent 400 error
Retry all other errors (network issues, timeouts, etc.)
Handle "file is too big" separately - Telegram Bot API has a 20MB download limit
All retries exhausted — return null so the message still reaches the agent
with a type-based placeholder (e.g. <media:audio>) instead of being dropped.
